name: cyberoracle-image2-raster-assets
generationMode: built-in image generation, prompted as image2-style production assets
note: The explicit CLI gpt-image-2 path was checked but OPENAI_API_KEY was not set in this environment. These files were generated with the built-in image generator and copied into docs/.

assets.role: visual target and art direction lock
assets.runtimeUse: Do not use directly as the interactive app background unless prototyping; use it to guide slicing and final prompts.
Draw once to OffscreenCanvas, then overlay procedural code rain, low-frequency fish, haze and vignette.
Crop into individual sprites, then export PNG/WebP. Use Canvas hit boxes from crop-guide.json.
Use as character reference. For runtime, generate or manually paint separated bust/eyes/mouth/hair layers.
Crop modal frames, tooltip frames, rings, burst shapes and scan strips for Canvas/HTML overlay.
